stemHtml:
Refer to figures or CAP 697 Figure 4.4, and Figure 4.5.3.2.
Using the following information as required, what is the minimum Additional Fuel required for a Commercial Air Transport flight in the Medium-Range Jet Transport (MRJT) aeroplane, to an isolated destination aerodrome?

Cruise level: FL350
Cruise speed: Mach 0.74
Total trip distance: 1131 NM
Average wind component: +17 kt
Average OAT: ISA
Contingency Fuel: 5% of the Trip Fuel
Estimated weight at destination: 48 000 kg
Destination elevation: 4500 ft
